title: cyperus pumilus var. membranaceus
intro: Cyperus pumilus var. membranaceus, also known as the Dwarf Cyperus or Water Sedge, is a perennial aquatic plant species that belongs to the sedge family, Cyperaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cyperus pumilus var. membranaceus include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat colds, fever, and other health issues.
